upgrade.pageSubtitle: Build trust, get verified, and reach more property managers across North America
upgrade.sylvitaSays: A verified badge instantly builds trust with property managers.
upgrade.freeTierDesc: Get listed in the directory with basic business info
upgrade.premiumTierDesc: Build trust with a verified badge and unlock more features
upgrade.featuredTierDesc: Maximum visibility at the top of category pages
upgrade.industryLeaderTierDesc: The ultimate package for market leaders
upgrade.freeFeature1: Listed in directory with basic info
upgrade.featuredFeature2: Featured at top of category pages
upgrade.industryLeaderFeature4: Monthly Backlink Article on Main Industry Blog
upgrade.faq1A: Yes — cancel anytime from your dashboard. Your verified status stays active until the end of the billing period.
upgrade.faq2A: Subscriptions are billed monthly. Your card is charged immediately when you sign up. Cancel anytime before the next renewal date to avoid the next charge.
upgrade.faq3Q: What does the Verified Vendor badge mean?
upgrade.faq3A: It tells property managers your business has been reviewed and confirmed as a legitimate vendor by the ProNearby team.
